sentence: 用公款请客吃饭是不允许的。
pinyin: Yòng gōng kuǎn qǐngkè chīfàn shì bù yǔnxǔ de.
english: Using public money to treat guests to dinner is not allowed.

meaning: 1. things like this (idiom); and so on; 2. and the rest; 3. etc
sentence: 锅、碗、筷子，诸如此类的厨房用品都放在这里。
pinyin: Guō, wǎn, kuàizi, zhū rú cǐ lèi de chúfáng yòngpǐn dōu fàng zài zhèlǐ.
english: Pots, bowls, chopsticks, and other such kitchen items are all kept here.

sentence: 市中心的房子我根本买不起。
pinyin: Shì zhōngxīn de fángzi wǒ gēnběn mǎi bù qǐ.
english: I simply can't afford an apartment in the city center.

meaning: glutinous rice and choice of filling wrapped in leaves and steamed or
sentence: 端午节我们一起包粽子吧。
pinyin: Duānwǔ jié wǒmen yīqǐ bāo zòngzi ba.
english: Let's make zongzi together for the Dragon Boat Festival.

meaning: 1. good and evil; 2. good versus evil
sentence: 孩子需要学会分辨善恶。
pinyin: Háizi xūyào xuéhuì fēnbiàn shàn'è.
english: Children need to learn to distinguish good from evil.

sentence: 护士在他的静脉上扎了针。
pinyin: Hùshi zài tā de jìngmài shang zhā le zhēn.
english: The nurse inserted a needle into his vein.

sentence: 感冒容易引起呼吸道感染。
pinyin: Gǎnmào róngyì yǐnqǐ hūxīdào gǎnrǎn.
english: Colds can easily cause respiratory tract infections.

sentence: 这位史学家写了很多关于汉代的书。
pinyin: Zhè wèi shǐxuéjiā xiě le hěn duō guānyú Hàndài de shū.
english: This historian has written many books about the Han dynasty.

sentence: 他三十岁就成了百万富翁。
pinyin: Tā sānshí suì jiù chéng le bǎiwàn fùwēng.
english: He became a millionaire at the age of thirty.

sentence: 请把文件保存到磁盘上。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ wénjiàn bǎocún dào cípán shang.
english: Please save the file to the disk.

sentence: 以前瑞士用法郎作为货币。
pinyin: Yǐqián Ruìshì yòng fǎláng zuòwéi huòbì.
english: Switzerland previously used the franc as its currency.

sentence: 他放弃神职回到了家乡。
pinyin: Tā fàngqì shénzhí huídào le jiāxiāng.
english: He gave up his clerical position and returned to his hometown.

meaning: 1. banking circles; 2. the world of finance
sentence: 她在金融界工作了二十年。
pinyin: Tā zài jīnróngjiè gōngzuò le èrshí nián.
english: She has worked in the world of finance for twenty years.

meaning: 1. attached externally (e.g. fuel tank); 2. plug-in; 3. add-on; 4. spe
sentence: 用外挂作弊会被封号。
pinyin: Yòng wàiguà zuòbì huì bèi fēng hào.
english: Using cheat software will get your account banned.

meaning: 1. the following year; 2. the next year
sentence: 他们在翌年春天举行了婚礼。
pinyin: Tāmen zài yìnián chūntiān jǔxíng le hūnlǐ.
english: They held their wedding in the spring of the following year.

sentence: 该国的武装部队参与了救灾行动。
pinyin: Gāi guó de wǔzhuāng bùduì cānyù le jiùzāi xíngdòng.
english: The country's armed forces participated in disaster relief operations.

sentence: 他用斧头劈开了木柴。
pinyin: Tā yòng fǔtóu pī kāi le mùchái.
english: He split the firewood with an ax.

sentence: 妈妈今天煮了山药排骨汤。
pinyin: Māma jīntiān zhǔ le shānyào páigǔ tāng.
english: Mom made yam and pork rib soup today.

sentence: 近几年居民的购买力明显增强了。
pinyin: Jìn jǐ nián jūmín de gòumǎilì míngxiǎn zēngqiáng le.
english: Residents' purchasing power has increased noticeably in recent years.

sentence: 这台收音机能收到多个波段。
pinyin: Zhè tái shōuyīnjī néng shōudào duō gè bōduàn.
english: This radio can receive multiple wave bands.

sentence: 明天下午可以看到日食。
pinyin: Míngtiān xiàwǔ kěyǐ kàndào rìshí.
english: A solar eclipse can be seen tomorrow afternoon.

sentence: 他把土地使用权转让给了邻居。
pinyin: Tā bǎ tǔdì shǐyòngquán zhuǎnràng gěi le línjū.
english: He transferred the land usage rights to his neighbor.

sentence: 婚礼在市政厅举行。
pinyin: Hūnlǐ zài shìzhèngtīng jǔxíng.
english: The wedding ceremony was held at city hall.

meaning: 1. work team; 2. working group; 3. task force
sentence: 公司成立了一个工作组来解决这个问题。
pinyin: Gōngsī chénglì le yī gè gōngzuòzǔ lái jiějué zhège wèntí.
english: The company set up a working group to solve this problem.

meaning: 1. to derive; 2. derived; 3. derivation; 4. to entail; 5. to induce; 6
sentence: 你可以把数据导出成表格文件。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ bǎ shùjù dǎochū chéng biǎogé wénjiàn.
english: You can export the data as a spreadsheet file.

sentence: 水越深，压强就越大。
pinyin: Shuǐ yuè shēn, yāqiáng jiù yuè dà.
english: The deeper the water, the greater the pressure.

sentence: 他打破了百米跑的世界纪录。
pinyin: Tā dǎpò le bǎimǐ pǎo de shìjiè jìlù.
english: He broke the world record in the 100-meter sprint.

sentence: 故宫的屋顶用的是黄色琉璃瓦。
pinyin: Gùgōng de wūdǐng yòng de shì huángsè liúlí wǎ.
english: The roofs of the Forbidden City are covered with yellow glazed tiles.

meaning: 1. to sit quietly; 2. to meditate; 3. to stage a sit-in
sentence: 他每天早上静坐二十分钟。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang jìngzuò èrshí fēnzhōng.
english: He meditates quietly for twenty minutes every morning.

sentence: 这把椅子是木质的，很轻便。
pinyin: Zhè bǎ yǐzi shì mùzhì de, hěn qīngbiàn.
english: This chair is wooden and very lightweight.

sentence: 女王头上戴着一顶金色王冠。
pinyin: Nǚwáng tóu shàng dàizhe yī dǐng jīnsè wángguān.
english: The queen wore a golden crown on her head.

meaning: 1. to be right next to; 2. to lean closely against
sentence: 超市紧靠着地铁站，很方便。
pinyin: Chāoshì jǐnkào zhe dìtiě zhàn, hěn fāngbiàn.
english: The supermarket is right next to the subway station, which is very convenient.

sentence: 一个汉字通常占两个字节。
pinyin: Yī gè hànzì tōngcháng zhàn liǎng gè zìjié.
english: A Chinese character usually takes up two bytes.

meaning: 1. to contain in a concealed form; 2. to keep covered up; 3. implicit
sentence: 他的话隐含着一层批评的意思。
pinyin: Tā de huà yǐnhán zhe yī céng pīpíng de yìsi.
english: His words contained an implicit layer of criticism.

meaning: 1. to transition to a new dynasty or regime; 2. to replace an older pr
sentence: 这款手机已经换代了，新款功能更强。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī yǐjīng huàndài le, xīn kuǎn gōngnéng gèng qiáng.
english: This phone model has been upgraded; the new version is more powerful.

sentence: 科学家正在研究干细胞治疗方法。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā zhèngzài yánjiū gàn xìbāo zhìliáo fāngfǎ.
english: Scientists are researching stem cell treatment methods.

sentence: 国王宣布退位，由儿子继承王位。
pinyin: Guówáng xuānbù tuìwèi, yóu érzi jìchéng wángwèi.
english: The king announced his abdication, passing the throne to his son.

meaning: 1. preliminary exam; 2. qualifying exam; 3. first try; 4. preliminary
sentence: 他通过了研究生初试，下周参加复试。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò le yánjiūshēng chūshì, xià zhōu cānjiā fùshì.
english: He passed the graduate school qualifying exam and will take the second round next week.

meaning: 1. to discredit; 2. to defame; 3. to smear sb's name; 4. to bring
sentence: 有人故意散布谣言来抹黑他。
pinyin: Yǒurén gùyì sànbù yáoyán lái mǒhēi tā.
english: Someone deliberately spread rumors to smear his reputation.

meaning: 1. to hunt and arrest (fugitives); 2. to track down and arrest; 3. a m
sentence: 警方连夜搜捕逃跑的嫌疑人。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng liányè sōubǔ táopǎo de xiányírén.
english: Police searched through the night to arrest the fleeing suspect.

meaning: 1. to break away; 2. to extricate; 3. to escape; 4. to leave the confi
sentence: 他费了很大力气才从困境中脱出。
pinyin: Tā fèi le hěn dà lìqi cái cóng kùnjìng zhōng tuōchū.
english: He had to put in a lot of effort to extricate himself from the difficult situation.

sentence: 新图书馆今天上午正式揭幕了。
pinyin: Xīn túshūguǎn jīntiān shàngwǔ zhèngshì jiēmù le.
english: The new library officially opened this morning.

sentence: 他用假证件骗取了银行贷款。
pinyin: Tā yòng jiǎ zhèngjiàn piànqǔ le yínháng dàikuǎn.
english: He used fake documents to fraudulently obtain a bank loan.

sentence: 这两种方法在数学上是等价的。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng zhǒng fāngfǎ zài shùxué shàng shì děngjià de.
english: These two methods are mathematically equivalent.

sentence: 手机出问题了，我只好重置一下。
pinyin: Shǒujī chū wèntí le, wǒ zhǐhǎo chóngzhì yīxià.
english: My phone had a problem, so I had no choice but to reset it.

sentence: 小路两旁种了很多灌木。
pinyin: Xiǎolù liǎng páng zhòng le hěn duō guànmù.
english: Many shrubs were planted along both sides of the path.

sentence: 我侄女今年刚上小学一年级。
pinyin: Wǒ zhínǚ jīnnián gāng shàng xiǎoxué yī niánjí.
english: My niece just started first grade this year.

meaning: 1. to make an inventory; 2. to take stock
sentence: 店里每年底都要盘点一次库存。
pinyin: Diàn lǐ měi nián dǐ dōu yào pándiǎn yī cì kùcún.
english: The store takes inventory once at the end of every year.

meaning: 1. to maintain; 2. to conserve; 3. curing (concrete etc)
sentence: 这段公路需要定期养护才能保持平整。
pinyin: Zhè duàn gōnglù xūyào dìngqī yǎnghù cái néng bǎochí píngzhěng.
english: This section of road needs regular maintenance to stay smooth.

sentence: 这是我自己的事，与你何干？
pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ zìjǐ de shì, yǔ nǐ hégān?
english: This is my own business — what does it have to do with you?
